svg.title: Secure S3 line processor architecture
svg.desc: An uploader sends JSON to policy-private Amazon S3 over HTTPS. Constrained S3 notifications invoke AWS Lambda, which reads the exact object version through the S3 API and writes safe processing metadata to CloudWatch Logs. GitHub Actions deploys through an account-provisioned OIDC role and CloudFormation. AWS manages service networking; the stack creates no customer VPC.
svg.text: Runtime data flow and protected CDK deployment — official AWS service icons
Role: read incoming/* · no S3 writes
Errors: reject malformed · retry AWS failures
Solid arrows: runtime traffic · Dashed arrows: deployment traffic · AWS-managed networking; no customer VPC
